concepts.finding:
We introduce our hands-on practice
with the novel solution-a decoupled UIC server for real-time infer-
ence of user interest modeling and a memory-based MIMN model
that can be implemented incrementally and outperform the other
state-of-the-art models.
concepts.implication: Can inform intent modeling for recommendation systems

concepts.finding:
The main contributions of this work are summarized as follows:
• We introduce a hands-on practice with the co-design of
learning algorithm and serving system for CTR prediction
task.
concepts.implication: General ML methodology applicable to content recommendation

view, we propose a novel memory-based architecture named MIMN

Technically, capturing user interests from
the rich behavior data is critically important since it contributes
remarkable improvement for typical real-world applications, such
as recommender system and online advertising [8, 30, 31].

NTM architecture with two designs of memory utilization
regularization and memory induction unit, making it more
suitable for user interest learning.

propose a new strategy named memory utilization regularization,
which is shown to be effective for user interest modeling.

models with ingeniously designed architecture for user interest
modeling have been proposed, bringing remarkable improvement
of model performance over offline metric.

system for CTR prediction task.

concepts.finding:
Here we borrow the idea of memory network
from NTM [11] and propose a novel architecture named MIMN
(Multi-channel user Interest Memory Network).
concepts.implication: Can inform intent modeling for recommendation systems

concepts.finding:
Moreover, MIMN
improves traditional NTM with two designs of memory utilization
regularization and memory induction unit, making it more efficient
for modeling user behavior sequences under limited storage and
bringing remarkable gain over model performance.
